contact.intro: Send a message and I'll get back to you within 1–2 working days. Or reach out directly:

steps.title: Book your free call
steps.text: A relaxed 30-minute conversation. We talk about where you are and what you're looking for.

steps.title: Get your plan
steps.text: I suggest the right mix of coaching, Reiki or readings — with clear expectations and pricing upfront.

steps.title: Begin your journey
steps.text: We meet online or in Beirut, at your pace. You stay in the driver's seat the whole way.

about.heading: Your guide to alignment
about.p1: I'm Laura — an integrative coach and energy healing practitioner based in Beirut. My work brings together **Human Design**, **Reiki** and intuitive tools like tarot to help you understand how you're uniquely wired, release what's holding you back, and move forward with confidence.
about.p2: No jargon, no one-size-fits-all formulas. Just a grounded, personal process built around your energy, your goals and your life.
checklist: A practical approach to spiritual tools
about.name: Laura Brambilla

human_design.heading: What is Human Design?
human_design.sub: Think of it as your energetic blueprint — a map of how you're designed to make decisions, use your energy and interact with the world.

cards.title: Know your type
cards.text: Discover how your energy naturally works — and why forcing yourself into someone else's strategy never felt right.

cards.title: Trust your decisions
cards.text: Learn your inner authority: a reliable, personal way to make choices without second-guessing everything.

cards.title: Live it, practically
cards.text: We translate your chart into everyday actions — career, relationships, boundaries — not abstract theory.

cta.heading: Ready to discover your path?
cta.text: The first step is a free, no-pressure 30-minute discovery call.

hero.headline: Bridge the gap between the *practical* and the *energetic*.
hero.lead: Integrative coaching grounded in Human Design and Reiki — so you can make real-life decisions that feel aligned, clear and truly yours.
bullets: No pressure — the first call is free

footer.tagline:
Human Design coaching & energy healing.
Beirut · Online worldwide.

services.heading: Integrative coaching for a holistic life
services.sub: Every journey starts with a free discovery call so we can find the right path for you.

items.title: Human Design Coaching
items.text: One-to-one coaching guided by your Human Design chart. Clarity on purpose, career, identity and the patterns that keep repeating.

items.title: Reiki Energy Healing
items.text: Gentle, deeply restorative energy work to release tension and stress, restore balance and reconnect body and mind.
bullets: In-person in Beirut or distance Reiki

items.title: Tarot Guidance
items.text: Intuitive readings used as a reflective tool — to surface what you already sense and open up honest, useful conversations.

testimonial.quote: Working with Laura gave me a completely new understanding of how I operate. The sessions were practical, warm and surprisingly precise — I left every one with something concrete to apply.
testimonial.name: Manuele Acconcia
